stars.description: FlyDSL is the Python front‑end of the project: Flexible LaYout DSL.
stars.highlights: FlyDSL is a Python front-end for a flexible layout DSL, enabling dynamic and customizable UI layouts. It focuses on simplifying layout design for Python applications.
stars.worthReading: It offers a novel approach to layout management in Python, potentially useful for developers building GUI applications or visualizations.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is low (166 stars, not clearly rising), relevance is moderate (tooling for UI layouts, not frontier AI), concreteness is high (working code).
